expected.notes: Student is not planning travel so travel_signature_risk must not fire despite being on F-1 status.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'travel_signature_risk', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.planning_travel eq yes
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
